description: Single long capture under stable conditions; post-hoc sweep of MATCH_HIGH_BASE / MATCH_MID_BASE via offline threshold_sweep tool. No protocol variation between runs — exactly one capture.
notes: Capture 5+ minutes of stable enrolled subjects. Use stabilization_report to inspect the resulting matched_rate vs th_high curve and pick a calibration point. Re-run the same session with adjusted CLOUD_THRESHOLD env var if the offload band needs tuning.
